source.section: 3 - AN/AAQ-28(V) LITENING II Targeting Pod > 3.5 - Pointing Methods > 3.5.5 - Point & Area Track

steps.action: Select FLIR page and press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the selected DDI.
steps.voiced: Select the FLIR page, then press Sensor Control Switch toward the active DDI.

steps.action: The Select Focus Diamond indicates what display is selected.
steps.voiced: Confirm the Select Focus Diamond appears on the FLIR DDI.

steps.action: Press the Undesignate button twice to select VVSLV mode.
steps.voiced: Press the Undesignate button twice to select VVSLV mode.

steps.action: Press the Undesignate button twice to select unselect VVSLV and switch to Snowplow mode.
steps.voiced: Press Undesignate twice again to deselect VVSLV and enter Snowplow mode.

steps.action: Press the Sensor Control Switch in the direction of the FLIR format page to toggle between Area Track and Point Track.
steps.voiced: Press Sensor Control Switch toward the FLIR page to toggle between Area Track and Point Track.

steps.action: In Area Track, the FLIR is slaved to the location of the Target and cannot be slewed.
steps.voiced: Confirm in Area Track the FLIR slaves to target location and cannot be manually slewed.

steps.action: Use the TDC DEPRESS control (“ENTER”) to designate the target.
steps.voiced: Press TDC DEPRESS to designate the target.

steps.action: Pressing the Undesignate button once will revert back to Snowplow mode.
steps.voiced: Press Undesignate once to revert to Snowplow mode.
